tools.name: get_bag_price
tools.description: Current cited US retail list price and estimated pristine secondary-market (resale) price for a Hermès bag, plus the resale-over-retail premium. Figures are documented/estimated and cited — never an appraisal.

tools.name: get_market_median
tools.description: Live cross-site median of CURRENT ASKING prices for a bag spec across tracked resale marketplaces, with the count of listings (n) and the retrieval date. Median of ASKS, never sold — asking prices only.

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: The LIVE weekly median-ASK series for a bag spec (our own cross-site measurement, public depth) within a timeframe. Archived (2015–2019 Internet-Archive) and cited SOLD anchors are partner-tier depth and are teased, not returned.

tools.name: get_price_increases
tools.description: The cited retail price-increase ledger for a brand (Hermès or Chanel): a dated record of verified past increases, each with source + retrieved date. A history of facts — never a forecast of the next hike.

tools.name: get_benchmark
tools.description: The community-reported pre-spend BENCHMARK for a city: the median pre-spend ratio (cumulative boutique spend ÷ bag retail) at which buyers reported being offered a bag. Community-reported, position not probability.

tools.name: about_orange_peel
tools.description: What Orange Peel is, what data an agent may cite, and exactly how to attribute it. Call this first.
